name: strat-source-mode
desc: P0-02 strategic-command (0x0b01 CommandSelectGrid) activation — candidate client fix. The strategic map's root current cell *(DAT_007cd04c+0x11178) stays 0 because nothing writes the INLINE current-source (mainState+0xc, read by FUN_004b5bb0 as source+0x320). Chain: dispatcher FUN_004ba2b0 case 0x325 calls FUN_004c2c80(this=mainState, mode=1, rec=0, optional=&unit[0]); mode=1 routes the optional record to slot mainState+0x80e8c, NOT the inline source mainState+0xc — so source+0x320 (== optional+0x08) is never written, +0x126714 stays 0, +0x11178 never gets the player cell, FUN_004d6310 rejects every click, no natural 0x0b01. The `push 1` (6A 01) feeding mode is at 0x004bb172; flipping its imm8 to 0 makes case 0x325 write the INLINE source so the player's unit (optional+0x08) populates the current cell. docs/logh7-implementation-specs.md §6. BYTE-VERIFIED against the installed G7MTClient.exe (0x004bb172 = 6A 01 E8...).
verified: LIVE-TESTED 2026-06-19: DO NOT USE — this global mode 1->0 flip BREAKS WORLD ENTRY. With the patch applied, the client reaches the session list (0x2005/0x2006) but never enters the world (no 0x0f02/0x0323/0x0325). Confirmed the spec's warning: dispatcher case 0x325 is the GENERAL unit-record delivery, used during world-load too; forcing mode=0 mis-routes those deliveries and stalls world entry. The MECHANISM is nonetheless PROVEN correct by the Frida positive-control (tools/logh7_p0_02_focus_pc.py): writing source+0x320 = home cell made *(DAT_007cd04c+0x11178)=2550 and FUN_004d6310 PASS. The viable production fix is the SURGICAL code-cave in tools/client_patches/strat-camera-focus.json (write source+0x320/0x11178 = own-unit cell at strategic-field init ONLY), NOT this broad mode flip.
result: NON-VIABLE (breaks world entry). Superseded by strat-camera-focus.json (surgical). Kept for the record + the byte-verified mode-routing analysis.

patches.note: push 1 -> push 0 : FUN_004c2c80 mode 1->0 in dispatcher case 0x325, so the 0x0325 optional record writes the INLINE strategic current-source (mainState+0xc / source+0x320) instead of slot mainState+0x80e8c

alternative: Server-side candidate (no exe patch): LOGH_PLAYER_FOCUS_CELL=1 seeds the unit +0x08 (commander) slot with the player home cell (row*100+col) in localFleetRecord() — since source+0x320 == optional+0x08, this populates the current cell without changing the routing mode. Try this first if the mode flip has unwanted side effects.
liveExperiment: stop; start canonical-playable with proven-safe flags (LOGH_LOBBY_OK_FORMAT=message32, LOGH_LOBBY_EARLY_OK=1, LOGH_SS_FORMAT=message32, LOGH_STRAT_GALAXY=1, LOGH_STRAT_GRID_EARLY=1, full-world+post-load player); relay/NPC OFF.

Attach FUNCTION-BOUNDARY-ONLY Frida hooks (mid-fn/call-site hooks crashed before): onEnter FUN_004c4170 (src320), onLeave (+0x126714,+0x126711); onEnter FUN_004c2c80 (mode,optional,dest); onLeave return-gated FUN_004d6310 (retval, STATE+0x24/+0x28, *(DAT+0x11178)).
Drive to world; left-click a known in-range cell. Observe whether +0x11178 == clicked cell, FUN_004d6310 passes, and an outbound 0x0b01 appears.
stop; verify canonical-playable SHA restored; no leftover G7MTClient/Frida/python or 47900/47901 listeners.
